Subject: New Poll for the MC Extended Meeting
Message:
Hi everyone -

As it turns out, January 18th does not work for the extended meeting.

Ken would like to me offer two additional dates.

 - Tuesday, January 15 starting with the Management Committee meeting at 11:00 and continue through till 4:00 or so.

-  Wednesday, January 16 beginning morning or afternoon - depending on schedules.

Please let me know.
